title: All The Wood We've Got
description: Adds wood variants like chests, ladders, and barrels based on BWG wood
body: ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4fe95dfc-9a34-4d57-9125-96b7d71e7b0f.png)                  [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4bce6dd3-7af5-4014-a705-04cd0c0adb87.png)](https://www.patreon.com/potionstudios)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_2e3d72d9-91b0-4d00-8eef-26be28254a6c.png)](https://discord.gg/zQA4eez2eS)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_84597b2e-8453-472a-9043-329d8218ac75.png)](https://x.com/_AOCAWOL)   **_"You have brains in your head. You have feet in your shoes. You can steer yourself in any direction you choose._ _You're on your own. And you know what you know. And YOU are the one who'll decide where to go"_** **_\-Dr. Seuss, Oh, The Places You'll Go!_**    **All The Wood We've Got is an official add-on mod by the developers of 'Oh The Biomes We've Gone'. It adds new wooden blocks to our wood types, such as Chests, Barrels, Ladders, and more! **    [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_cce93a0d-9721-4764-924b-1439022c7aba.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/aocawol)
